message:
feat(doctor): add Option B throttling for mol-dog-doctor molecules (gt-loah)

Refactor checkHealthLocked() sub-checks to return warning strings instead
of logging directly. Daemon pours mol-dog-doctor molecule only when anomalies
are detected, with 5-minute cooldown. Silent when healthy — molecules for
events, not heartbeats. Reduces potential wisp volume from ~2880/day to
max 288/day.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
